hiw_subtitle: Follow these simple steps to plan your perfect trip and connect with fellow travelers.
hiw_s1_desc: Sign up with email or social media in under 2 minutes.
hiw_s2_desc: Add your travel preferences and interests.
hiw_s3_desc: Browse destinations and create your itinerary.
hiw_f1_desc: Use our advanced search filters to find destinations that match your interests, budget, and travel style. Browse curated collections, read expert guides, and view photos from our community.
hiw_f2_desc: Create detailed day-by-day plans with our intuitive itinerary builder. Add activities, restaurants, and accommodations. Get AI-powered suggestions based on your preferences.
hiw_f3_desc: Compare prices and book flights, hotels, and activities directly through our platform. Access exclusive deals and member discounts. Manage all bookings in one place.
hiw_f4_desc: Access your itinerary offline via mobile app. Get real-time updates and notifications. Use our 24/7 support for assistance during your trip.
hiw_f5_desc: Post photos, write reviews, and share tips with the community. Help other travelers by rating destinations and services. Build your travel portfolio.
hc_search: Search for articles, guides, and FAQs...
hc_cat1_desc: Learn the basics of planning your first Balkan trip.
hc_cat2_desc: Manage your settings, preferences, and saved itineraries.
hc_cat3_desc: Information about currency, payments, and local bookings.
hc_cat4_desc: Travel insurance, local laws, and safety tips for the region.
hc_cat5_desc: Troubleshooting app issues and reporting bugs.
hc_cat6_desc: How to interact with others in our community forums.
hc_faq1_q: How does the AI itinerary planning work?
hc_faq1_a: Our AI analyzes thousands of local data points, including transport schedules, opening hours, and local reviews, to create a personalized plan based on your interests and travel pace.
hc_faq2_a: Yes, the core planning features and community access are completely free. We may offer premium features like offline maps and exclusive local deals in the future.
hc_faq3_q: Can I use the app offline while traveling?
hc_faq3_a: Currently, you need an internet connection to generate and save plans. However, you can export your finalized itinerary as a PDF for offline access.
hc_faq4_q: How do I contribute to the community?
hc_faq4_a: Once you have an account, you can post your travel stories, share photos, and comment on other travelers' posts in the Community section.
hc_faq5_a: We currently focus on Kosovo, Albania, Montenegro, and North Macedonia, with plans to expand to the entire Balkan peninsula soon.
hc_cta_title: Still can't find what you're looking for?
hc_cta_desc: Our support team is available 24/7 to help you with any questions or issues you might have.
contact_subtitle: Have questions about your Balkan adventure? We're here to help you plan the perfect trip.
contact_community_cta: Want to see what others are saying?
contact_sent_desc: Thank you for reaching out. Our team will get back to you within 24 hours.
tips_subtitle: Everything you need to know before you pack your bags. Practical advice for a smooth and authentic Balkan experience.
tips_transport_desc: Buses are the primary way to travel between cities. Train networks are limited, so check bus schedules at local stations or sites like Gjirafa for Albania/Kosovo.
tips_currency_desc: While cards are accepted in major cities, the Balkans is still very much a cash-heavy region. Always carry local currency (Lek, Denar, Euro) for small shops and cafes.
tips_connectivity_desc: Roaming can be expensive if you are from outside the EU. We recommend getting a local SIM card (like Vodafone or IPKO) which are cheap and offer plenty of data.
tips_etiquette_desc: Coffee culture is huge. Expect to spend hours in cafes. People are incredibly hospitable — don't be surprised if a local offers you a drink or directions.
tips_safety_desc: The Balkans are generally very safe for travelers. Standard precautions apply, but violent crime is rare. Tap water is safe in most major cities, but ask locals first.
tips_language_desc: English is widely spoken by the younger generation and in tourist areas. Learning a few basic phrases in Albanian, Serbian, or Macedonian goes a long way!
tips_cta_desc: Our community of travelers and locals is always ready to help. Join the conversation and get real-time advice.
dest_subtitle: From hidden mountain villages to sun-drenched coastlines — your next adventure starts here.
dest_no_results_desc: Try adjusting your search or filters to find what you're looking for.
